name: SDK Release Dev Container
postCreateCommand: HOST_UID=$(id -u) && CUSER=jhkim && if ! id $CUSER &>/dev/null; then sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash -u $HOST_UID $CUSER || sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash -o -u $HOST_UID $CUSER; fi && sudo usermod -aG sudo $CUSER 2>/dev/null || true && echo "$CUSER ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/$CUSER > /dev/null && sudo chmod 440 /etc/sudoers.d/$CUSER && sudo chown $CUSER:$CUSER /home/$CUSER && sudo chown -R $CUSER:$CUSER /home/$CUSER/.claude 2>/dev/null || true && sudo mkdir -p /home/$CUSER/.config && sudo chown -R $CUSER:$CUSER /home/$CUSER/.config 2>/dev/null || true && if [ ! -d /sdk_release/.git ]; then sudo mkdir -p /sdk_release && sudo chown $CUSER:$CUSER /sdk_release && git clone --depth 1 git@github.com:xcena-dev/sdk_release.git /sdk_release && cd /sdk_release && git submodule update --init --recursive --depth 1; fi && if [ ! -d /llvm-project/.git ]; then sudo mkdir -p /llvm-project && sudo chown $CUSER:$CUSER /llvm-project && git clone --depth 1 -b dev git@github.com:xcena-dev/llvm-project-fork.git /llvm-project; fi
